CustomField.description: Convert the multipick list in a string since includes method compare only string litterals Used to align migration date
CustomField.formula: IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "FR"), "FR", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "AT"), "AT", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "BE"), "BE", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "DE"), "DE", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "GB"), "GB", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "XI"), "XI", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "LU"), "LU", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "IT"), "IT", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "ES"), "ES", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "SE"), "SE", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "CH"), "CH", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "TW"), "TW", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "NL"), "NL", NULL) + BR() + IF(INCLUDES( ShareClass__r.Country__c , "PT"), "PT", NULL)
CustomField.label: TECH_ShareClassCountry
